prestazioni: Engine: 2.5L TFSI (EA855 Evo, **DAZA** engine code) upgraded with a **Garrett GTX3582R Gen II** turbocharger (82mm compressor, 62mm turbine) paired with a **Precision Turbo & Engine 46mm wastegate** for 1.5 bar (21.7 psi) peak boost, targeting 600+ WHP on **Motec M150 ECU** with custom ethanol-compatible fuel maps (E85 flex-fuel via **Continental HPFP** upgrade).

Drivetrain: **AP Racing CP9660-2600** 6-piston front brake calipers with **380mm two-piece rotors** (floating, slotted) and **Ferodo DS2500** pads, paired with a **Wavetrac TTRS-specific limited-slip differential (LSD)** with 45% lockup under load, reinforced with **034 Motorsport billet differential mounts**.

Suspension: **Öhlins TTX40 MkII coilovers** (3-way adjustable, 24-way rebound, 15-way compression) with **TT RS-specific camber plates** (adjustable to -4.5° front, -3.8° rear) and **H&R 25mm front / 20mm rear anti-roll bars** (solid, adjustable links), paired with **034 Motorsport subframe reinforcement kit** to eliminate flex under hard cornering.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 TT RS widebody kit** (carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with **custom 3M Matte Military Green (212-60) wrap** and **debadged Audi rings** (replaced with **BBS LM-R 9.5x19 ET35** wheels in **Gunmetal with red lip**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R 255/30/19** tires).

**AWE Track Edition Touring exhaust system** (dual 3.5" polished tips, resonated center section) with **custom X-pipe delete** for aggressive crackle tune, paired with **Forge Motorsport carbon fiber engine cover** (gloss black) and **034 Motorsport billet oil cap (red anodized)** for visual contrast.

**Recaro Sportster CS (TT RS-specific) seats** in **Nappa leather with red Alcantara inserts**, wrapped in **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses (red)**, paired with **TT RS Heritage Edition shift knob (weighted, aluminum)** and **custom LED interior lighting (Philips Hue for RGB ambient glow)** with **carbon fiber door cards (Eurocarbon).**
